title: The Most Wanted Man
writer: Max Favalelli, Michel Audiard, Jean Manse
actors: Fernandel, Zsa Zsa Gabor, Louis Seigner
plot: Joe Calvert (Fernandel) is a nearsighted, friendly man who works as a clerk in a large department store, who gets into embarrassing situations when he isn't wearing his glasses. Since Joe works in the department that sells cowboy ...
